game_name: Home Alone 2: Lost in New York

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Primary combat tool against walking enemies
Context-specific crowd control, references film scene

typical_tension_triggers: Location transitions (Plaza Hotel, Central Park, townhouse, NYC streets)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Combat-punctuated platforming with location-based progression; tension builds through enemy encounters and platforming challenges, releases through power-up collection and successful navigation

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to basic slide movement and flying fist combat; walking enemies present manageable threat
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Dart gun and super flying fist acquired; necklace mechanic provides tactical options; enemy density and platforming complexity increase
notable_spikes: Enemy wave progression requiring mastery of multiple attack types
Transitions between themed locations (Plaza Hotel to Central Park to townhouse to NYC streets)

notable_level_patterns.description: Game structured around traversing distinct New York locations from film: Plaza Hotel, Central Park, Uncle Rob's townhouse, and NYC streets. Each location serves as distinct progression checkpoint.
Gameplay mechanics directly reference film scenes: necklace power-up recalls pearls-as-tripwire scene; dart gun and after shave items tie to Kevin's trap-making and disguise tactics
Alternates between platforming sections requiring slide and navigation, and combat encounters against walking enemies using fist attacks and weapons

sources_used: wikipedia - Home Alone 2: Lost in New York (video game)
